output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P31 wd:Q319157 ; rdfs:label ?matchLabel ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P159 ?winner .
  FILTER(LANG(?matchLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?matchLabel) , 'women'))
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?matchLabel) , 'royal rumble'))
  .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2018)
  .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
